meta.title: InterviewMate RAG
meta.description: Local RAG interview practice: JD papers, AI grading, and Tutor learning

landing.headline: ACE YOUR NEXT INTERVIEW. SIMPLIFIED.
landing.subtitle: The all-in-one platform with JD Vector Papers, Parallel Grading, and RAG Tutor.

common.feedbackLocaleHint: Grading feedback language follows model defaults; full locale grading coming soon.

errors.sessionFailed: Could not create session. Check backend (default http://127.0.0.1:8000) and NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL.
errors.topicsContext: Missing topic context from generation; please regenerate.
errors.jdMinLength: Learning plan requires JD text of at least ~40 characters.

session.title: Mock interview
session.subtitle: Configure a session, answer on cards; Next submits grading in the background.
session.subtitleFlow: Pick how you want to practice — then configure your session in one focused flow.
session.modeSwitchHint: Click either card below to switch how you practice
session.modeAiDesc: Paste a job description — AI recreates a realistic interview from your JD.
session.modeTopicsDesc: Mix tech stacks freely and drill weak areas with targeted practice.
session.jdEditorHint: Markdown-friendly — paste bullets, requirements, or full JD text.
session.jdPlaceholderMd:
## Role
Senior Backend Engineer

- Python, distributed systems
- 3+ years experience…
session.jdMinHint: At least ~40 characters required to build a paper.
session.topicsGridHint: Select one or more tags per cluster — questions will match your stack.
session.jdPlaceholder: Paste full JD or key requirements…
session.noBack: You cannot go back in this session

learn.title: Learn
learn.subtitle: Syllabus on the left, immersive Tutor on the right — linked in real time.
learn.syllabusDesc: Configure JD and weak areas, then generate your roadmap.
learn.jdPlaceholder: Paste full JD or key requirements (~40+ chars)…
learn.weakPlaceholder: Type and press Enter — e.g. concurrency, RAG…
learn.tutorDesc: Streaming RAG chat · click syllabus cards to ask
learn.welcomeBody: Generate a plan on the left, or ask anything about your JD and weak areas.

auth.subtitle: Password or one-time code — your choice.
auth.termsHint: By continuing you agree to our terms and privacy policy.
auth.errorPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters
